description: Configures an issuer to sign certificates using a CyberArk Certificate Manager Self-Hosted or SaaS policy zone.

cloud.description: Cloud specifies the CyberArk Certificate Manager SaaS configuration settings. Only one of CyberArk Certificate Manager may be specified.

tpp.description: TPP specifies CyberArk Certificate Manager Self-Hosted configuration settings. Only one of CyberArk Certificate Manager may be specified.

zone.description: Zone is the Certificate Manager Policy Zone to use for this issuer. All requests made to the Certificate Manager platform will be restricted by the named zone policy. This field is required.
